titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 164: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 164. (A.R. No. 118 of 1940.) TIRUVATTIYŪR, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, Chidambarēśvara shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

Damaged. Records a gift of twenty-five kaḻañju of gold weighed by the dhanmakaṭṭaḷai stone, by Āruraṉ Ambalattaḍigaḷ, the chief queen of Uttama-chōḻa for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity of Tiruvottūr. The ūrār of Kuśavaṉ Puduppākkattūr in Kāyirampēḍu-nāḍu (a sub-division of) Puliyūr-kōṭṭam received the amount and agreed to measure out an uḻakku of oil daily by two measure dēvarṉāḻi to the priests serving at the sanctum in the temple. It also appears that the ūrār agreed to remit a fine of eight and half kāṇam in case there is any default on their part in supplying oil to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmakku yāṇṭu patinañcāvatu tiruvot
ttama coḻar mahādeviyār Āruraṉ Ampalattaṭikaḷ śantrādityavaṟ Oru tirunontā viḷakkerikka vai
tta poṉ dhanma kaṭṭaḷaiyāl tuḷainiṟai Irupattaiṅ kaḻa taiṅ kaḻañcum pu
liyūrkoṭṭattu kāyiram peṭunāṭṭu kucavaṉ putuppākkattūrom koṇṭu nicatam Uḻakkum tevaraṉāḻi
yoṭokkum Uḻakkiṉāl śrīkoyilukke koṇṭu ceṉṟu tiruuṇṇāḻikai Uṭaiyārkaḷ vacam
Aṭṭuvomāṉom Ivveṇṇai
ṇaiyum Ivveṇṇaiyaṭ
Eṭṭaraikkāṇam taṇṭapaṭa Oṭṭik kuṭuttom I
ṅkuṭuppomāṉom Itaṇṭappaṭṭum Ivve
kucavaṉ putuppākkattūrom Ūr cola ve
tta civaṉṉeṉ Itdharmma rakṣippāṉ panmāheśvaincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
